note: Local-only entity registrations absent from the live Base44 capture (docs/source-capture/20260702-live-entity-schemas.json, kept pristine as provenance evidence). Merged into the shim's entity list by server/db.mjs loadEntityNames().

schemas.reason: src/entities/all.js exports Payment and src/pages/Finances.jsx lists/filters it (appointment_id, amount, status, payment_date, payment_method), but the live platform registered no such entity — the Finances page could never load payment data. Registered locally so the page functions; storage is the same schemaless JSON-blob table as every other entity.

client_id.description: Client the payment was made for

schemas.reason: Replaces the old LegalAcceptance stub (one monolithic, versioned-by-a-hardcoded-string record) with the distinct-event model required by the AssessSuite Legal Acceptance and Versioning Specification (policy-suite-20260711/27) — every acceptance, acknowledgement or consent is its own immutable, individually typed record. See src/lib/legal/documentRegistry.js for the event-type/document mapping this schema mirrors.

event_type.description: Which distinct legal event this record evidences — never bundle more than one type per row

user_email.description: Actor who performed the affirmative action

org_id.description: Organisation the actor belonged to at the time (owning org for scoping)

actor_capacity.description: e.g. practice owner / invited clinician / patient representative

suite_version.description: Policy suite version shown, e.g. RC-2026.07.11 — must match src/lib/legal/documentRegistry.js SUITE_VERSION

document_id.description: Registry id of the document this event relates to (documentRegistry.js), null for events with no single bound document

document_title.description: Snapshot of the document title as displayed, independent of later registry renames

document_fingerprint.description: Non-cryptographic content fingerprint of the exact text shown (documentRegistry.js fingerprint())

session_context.description: For recording_consent: the appointment/SOAP-note id the consent covers. Null for signup-time events.

user_agent.description: Browser user agent at the time of the affirmative action

ip_address.description: Best-effort; 'not-collected-local-shim' where the local dev backend cannot observe a real client IP
